name: get_project_context
description: Detects language, framework, package manager, runtime version, build/test/dev commands, API routes, env vars, and entry points from a project.

name: read_code
description: AST-based surgical code extraction. Returns the signature, body, and optional usages of a specific function, class, method, or type.

name: find_code
description: BM25-ranked code search with full enclosing function/class context. Supports literal, regex, and boolean queries.

name: check_package
description: Live registry lookup for any package. Returns version status, supply-chain attack signals, typosquat risk, weekly downloads, license, and deprecation status.

name: audit_package
description: Deep package intelligence. Returns breaking changes across versions, CVE list with CVSS scores, official migration steps, and deprecated API surface.

name: explain_architecture
description: End-to-end architecture analysis with Mermaid diagrams. Detects entry points, auth flow, data flow, service boundaries, and architectural anti-patterns.

name: Zephex_dev_info
description: Expert developer knowledge base. Answers questions about database schemas, mobile pre-deploy checklists, frontend patterns, security reviews, and auth setups.

name: scope_task
description: AST-based task scoping. Returns the minimal focus file set, reusable utilities, callers-at-risk, and risk assessment for a development task.

name: audit_headers
description: Wire-level audit of a deployed endpoint. Grades security headers, SSL/TLS certificate, redirect chain, and cookies with an A+ to F score.

name: thinking
description: Persistent reasoning session for hard problems. Tracks hypotheses, observations, plans, revisions, and conclusions across tool calls.
